summary: Phase 1 mock data layer for seller personas: typed schemas, validators, PII key forbids, and three Vietnamese fixtures (new/leakage/growth) with volumetric orders, returns, affiliate events, ad campaigns, and colocated task copy.

interfaceChanges.description: Public loader for selecting a hardcoded seller persona by id with no network I/O.
Runtime validator for seller persona fixtures (schema + PII policy).

mappings.criterion: AC1: JSON schemas exist for seller profile, task, order, return, affiliate event, and ad campaign
AC2: Three persona fixtures (new, leakage, growth) are loadable
AC3: Task copy is colocated with fixtures and copy_source is mock
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_seller_persona_fixtures.test.ts::ships task title, body, and CTA with persona new

mappings.criterion: AC4: Schemas forbid buyer PII; only masked buyer identifiers are used
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_seller_persona_fixtures.test.ts::contains no forbidden buyer PII fields in new

mappings.criterion: AC5: Unit tests validate each persona fixture against its schema
AC6: Public loader can load a persona by id with no network calls
